data: {"generalSituation":"A dry northeast monsoon will continue to bring generally fine weather to the coast of Guangdong in the next couple of days. It will remain cool over the region this morning. With the monsoon moderating early next week, temperatures will rise gradually over southern China. Winds will be weak and the weather will become humid over the coast of Guangdong midweek next week. It will be warm during the day. An easterly airstream is expected to affect the region in the latter part of next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260314","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"East force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 offshore and on high ground at first.","forecastWeather":"Mainly fine and dry.
